prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约10609名→10347名→10593名→10036名→10181名，整体在10000–10600区间窄幅波动，近5年最大波动约570名；2025年基准位次 约10181名，较2024年小幅后移约145名，整体走势平稳偏后移；该校在陕西省招生计划持续大幅扩招：2021–2023年每年仅10人，2024年增至19人（+90%），202 5年进一步增至27人（+42%），2026年计划34人，较2025年再扩招约25.9%。连续三年大幅扩招显著增加了招生名额，对录取位次产生明显的下行压力（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名主榜第28名（2026年），近年排名稳定在第28–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校行列。盘锦校区与 主校区共享985平台，但地域位置在辽宁省盘锦市，非大连主城区，对部分考生存在一定地域顾虑；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常 信号；2024年曾出现投档线降至420分的异常报道，虽经核实为个别省份特殊批次数据，但仍对报考心理产生一定负面影响。抖音热度排名第55（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等 偏上，关注度尚可；依托大连理工大学主校学科实力，化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件 工程A，以及环境科学与工程A-、控制科学与工程A-等。盘锦校区开设的能源化学工程（对应化工A+）、环境生态工程（对应环境A-）、生物科学类等专业均有强势学科支撑。
6 .【专业热度与环境】能源化学工程（化工类）社会热度分化观望，生物科学类（生化环材类）社会热度明显劝退，经济学类（财经类）社会热度分化观望；陕西省2026年物理类 考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，非一线城市，对陕西考生而言属于跨省 就读。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次平稳偏后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约25.9%（显著拉低位次 ）、陕西省物理类考生增加约19.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面信号（轻微拉低位次），考虑考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应，小幅修正后预测最 低位次约11685名，区间11185–12185名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程
- 海洋技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（生物信息学、生物科学）
- 环境生态工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（电子商务、经济学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11185–12185名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺能源化学工程（A+学科）；位次在区间中段（约11600名附近）以生物科学类和环境生态工程为主；位次接近区间上限（12000名以上）以经济学类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 10609 → 10347 → 10593 → 10036 → 10181, fluctuating narrowly within the 10000–10600 range, with a maximum fluctuation of about 570 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 10181, slightly shifting back by about 145 positions compared to 2024, with an overall stable but slightly backward trend; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi Province has been continuously and significantly expanding: only 10 students per year from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 19 in 2024 (+90%), further increasing to 27 in 2025 (+42%), and planning 34 in 2026, an additional expansion of about 25.9% compared to 2025. Three consecutive years of substantial expansion have significantly increased enrollment quotas, exerting obvious downward pressure on admission rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering universities. The Panjin Campus shares the 985 platform with the main campus, but is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, not the main urban area of Dalian, causing some regional concerns for certain candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving signals of admission gaps or abnormal cutoff scores; in 2024, there were abnormal reports of the cutoff score dropping to 420 points, which, although verified as data from special batches in individual provinces, still had a certain negative impact on the psychology of applicants. Douyin popularity ranking 55th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure is moderately high, with acceptable attention; relying on the disciplinary strength of the main campus of Dalian University of Technology, Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, as well as Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc. The Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering (corresponding to Chemical Engineering A+), Environmental Ecological Engineering (corresponding to Environmental Science and Engineering A-), and Biological Sciences, all supported by strong disciplines.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Energy Chemical Engineering (chemical engineering category) social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Biological Sciences (biology, chemistry, environment, materials category) social popularity is clearly discouraged, Economics (finance category) social popularity is divided and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, not a first-tier city, and for Shaanxi candidates, it involves studying across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the stable but slightly backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 25.9% (significantly lowering rankings), the increase in physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province by about 19.7% (intensifying competition), and the slightly negative reputation signal (slightly lowering rankings), with a minor correction considering the intensified competition effect from the increase in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11685, with a range of 11185–12185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Marine Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biological Sciences (Bioinformatics, Biological Science)
- Environmental Ecological Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (E-commerce, Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11185–12185, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), focus on aiming for Energy Chemical Engineering (A+ discipline); if the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 11600), prioritize Biological Sciences and Environmental Ecological Engineering; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 12000), use Economics as a safety option.
